goal: Fine-tune an ACT policy on SO-101 pick-place data and validate open-loop

overview.summary: entrypoint=lerobot-train, policy=act; risks: steps>>data, output_dir must be on /opt/data

dataset_explore.summary: v3.0, 52 eps/19631 frames, cameras front+wrist, state/action dim 6

preprocess.summary: held out 5/52 episodes for eval (seed 42); train=47

training_plan.summary: ~17100 frames, 6 epochs -> 6414 steps, batch 16, save_freq 600, workers 4
